stemHtml: An aeroplane and a glider are approaching to land at an aerodrome. Which one of them shall give way to the other...

options.a: The aeroplane, if it is able to carry out a missed approach procedure.
options.b: The aeroplane, regardless of the altitude of the glider.
options.c: The glider, if their trajectories are converging and the aeroplane is on its left side.
options.d: The glider, if the aeroplane is flying at a lower altitude.
